series_metadata.series_description: Consists of all documentation associated with the Driver Training program. Includes Certificates of Completion, Instructor Applications, Enterprise Applications, general correspondence, project files, motor vehicle inspection documentation, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain database files for a period of 10 plus one (1) years. Retain shared drive files for a period of five (5) years. ; Paper: Retain until identified and indexed, then destroy. Retain currently stored files for a period of three (3) years plus current., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
